name: Aryan Bhavsar
affiliation: Dept. of Computer Science & Engineering · IIT Indore

about.tagline: Building networks for AI — enabling scalable, efficient, and sustainable AI training and inference systems in large-scale data center and cloud environments.
about.description: I am a second year PhD student in Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Indore, advised by Dr. Sidharth Sharma (IIT Jodhpur) and Dr. Ayan Mondal (IIT Indore), working at the intersection of AI/ML systems and data center networking. My interests center on the network fabric for large-scale distributed DNN training — high-performance transport and flow control over modern Ethernet-based RDMA fabrics (RoCE, Ultra Ethernet) — where communication increasingly bottlenecks training at scale.
